task_completion.description: Log into Rancher and access the 'local' cluster.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rancher web interface (https://localhost) logged in, with the 'local' cluster selected in the navigation menu or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the ResourceQuotas section for the 'data-processing' namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI displaying the ResourceQuotas list, specifically showing 'processing-quota' within the 'data-processing' namespace.

task_completion.description: Update the 'processing-quota' ResourceQuota to have a total memory limit of at least 1.5Gi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit screen or YAML view for 'processing-quota' showing the memory limit field set to '1.5Gi' (or higher), followed by a save action or success notification.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Workloads/Deployments section and locate the 'batch-analyzer' workload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI displaying the Workloads list or the specific detail/edit page for the 'batch-analyzer' deployment in the 'data-processing' namespace.

task_completion.description: Update the 'batch-analyzer' workload to have a memory limit of at least 400Mi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit screen or YAML view for the 'batch-analyzer' workload showing the memory limit field set to '400Mi' (or higher), followed by a save action or success notification.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher web interface to perform the tasks as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rancher GUI in a web browser rather than relying exclusively on terminal kubectl commands.
No screenshots show the agent editing, saving changes to, or deleting the 'stream-router' workload.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the browser to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible progression of navigating menus, typing in input fields, and clicking save buttons within the Rancher UI, rather than just showing a final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace: 'data-processing'. Target deployments: 'batch-analyzer', 'stream-router'. Target ResourceQuota: 'processing-quota'. The task requires setting the memory limit of 'processing-quota' to >= 1.5Gi and 'batch-analyzer' to >= 400Mi. The 'stream-router' deployment must not be modified.
